message:
feat(render): add theming, accessibility, and diamond arrowhead support

Enhances SVG rendering with comprehensive theming, accessibility features,
and additional diagram primitives for professional output.

fm-render-svg/src/ (major expansion):
- a11y.rs: Accessibility utilities - ARIA labels, keyboard nav CSS, diagram descriptions
- theme.rs: ThemePreset enum, ThemeColors struct, FontConfig, CSS generator
- lib.rs: Integrate theme/a11y into render pipeline, add diamond arrowhead marker
- defs.rs: ArrowheadMarker::diamond_marker() for entity-relationship diagrams
- element.rs: Additional shape primitives and attribute helpers

fm-render-canvas/src/:
- context.rs: Align canvas rendering with SVG coordinate system updates
- renderer.rs/shapes.rs: New canvas rendering primitives

fm-core/src/:
- font_metrics.rs: Font measurement utilities for text layout
- lib.rs: Export font_metrics module

fm-layout/src/lib.rs:
- Layout algorithm refinements for new shape types

SvgRenderConfig now includes:
- theme: ThemePreset (Default, Dark, HighContrast, Monochrome, etc)
- embed_theme_css: Whether to inline theme styles
- a11y: A11yConfig with aria_labels, accessibility_css, keyboard_nav flags

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
